Landing.title: Reduce waste, increase margin.
Landing.subtitle: The all-in-one tool for food trucks and dark kitchens.

hero.title: Your food truck, powered by AI. Zero waste.
hero.subtitle: FoodTracks manages your inventory, predicts your sales, and tracks your margins in real time — so you prep the right amount, every day.

problem.title: Sound familiar?
problem.subtitle: Every food truck owner faces the same daily challenges.
problem.guessDesc: Every morning you guess how many portions to make. Too many = waste. Too few = lost sales.
problem.spotDesc: Saturday at the market and Tuesday downtown are not the same crowd. But you prepare the same way.
problem.shortageDesc: 30 orders in and you realise you're out of flour. Too late to fix.

howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.subtitle: From sign-up to optimization in 4 steps.
howItWorks.step1Desc: Scan your supplier invoices with AI. Your stock updates automatically — no more manual data entry.
howItWorks.step2Desc: See your costs, margins, and performance by dish, by day, and by location on a clear dashboard.
howItWorks.step3Desc: AI analyses your past sales and tells you exactly how much to prep tomorrow, adjusted for spot and day.
howItWorks.step4Desc: Reduce waste, boost margins, and adapt your menu with data. Your food truck runs at full capacity.

predictions.title: AI that learns your sales patterns
predictions.subtitle: FoodTracks analyses your past sales, day of the week, and location to predict exactly what you'll sell tomorrow.
predictions.bullet1: Weighted by recency — recent weeks matter more

readiness.title: Know if you have enough stock before you start
readiness.subtitle: FoodTracks cross-references predictions with your inventory. Instantly see what's covered and what's short.

features.title: Everything you need to run your truck
features.subtitle: From inventory to margins to multi-spot planning.
features.mobileDesc: Scan invoices with AI, track stock in real-time, works offline.
features.marginDesc: Know the exact cost per dish, margin %, and which recipes are profitable.
features.multiSpotDesc: Assign locations to days, track GPS, compare performance by spot.

pricing.title: Start for free, upgrade when ready
pricing.subtitle: No credit card required. Cancel anytime.
pricing.disclaimer: 14-day free trial on Pro. No credit card required.

q1.question: Is there a free plan?
q1.answer: Yes, FoodTracks is free to start with 1 location and basic features. Upgrade to Pro (€29/mo) when you need advanced analytics and AI features.

q2.question: Do I need to install anything?
q2.answer: No, FoodTracks is a web app that works on any device — phone, tablet, or computer. No download needed.

q3.question: How do AI predictions work?
q3.answer: FoodTracks analyses your past sales by day of week and location. The more data you add, the more accurate predictions become.

q4.question: Can I manage multiple locations?
q4.answer: Yes, Pro plan supports unlimited locations. You can assign spots to days and compare performance across locations.

q5.question: Is my data secure?
q5.answer: Your data is encrypted and hosted on European servers. We never share your data with third parties.

q6.question: Can I cancel anytime?
q6.answer: Yes, no commitment. Cancel from your settings at any time. Your data stays available for 30 days after cancellation.

q7.question: Does FoodTracks work with SumUp?
q7.answer: Yes! FoodTracks integrates directly with SumUp via OAuth. Your transactions are automatically imported, recipes matched, and stock deducted. Connect your SumUp terminal in seconds from Settings → Integrations.

q1.question: How do I connect SumUp to FoodTracks?
q1.answer: It's very simple: from your FoodTracks dashboard, go to Integrations > SumUp and click 'Connect'. You'll be redirected to SumUp to authorize access. The entire process takes less than 2 minutes.

q2.question: Is the SumUp integration free?
q2.answer: Yes, the SumUp integration is included in all FoodTracks plans, including the free plan. No additional fees are charged for the connection or synchronization.

q3.question: Which SumUp terminals are compatible?
q3.answer: All SumUp terminals are compatible: SumUp Air, SumUp 3G, SumUp Solo, and payments via the SumUp app on smartphone. Synchronization works with all SumUp card readers.

q4.question: Is synchronization real-time?
q4.answer: Yes, every SumUp transaction is automatically synced with FoodTracks within seconds. Your stock, revenue and margins are updated in real time during service.

q5.question: Is my data secure?
q5.answer: Absolutely. The connection uses the OAuth 2.0 protocol (the same as Google or Facebook). Your data is hosted on European servers compliant with GDPR. We never store your SumUp credentials.

q1.question: How does FoodTracks update stock automatically?
q1.answer: Every sale recorded in FoodTracks automatically decrements the ingredients used in the recipe. If you sell a burger, the quantities of bun, meat, lettuce and sauce are immediately deducted from your stock.

q2.question: Can I set minimum stock alerts?
q2.answer: Yes, you can set a minimum threshold for each ingredient. When stock drops below the threshold, you receive a push notification and email to warn you before you run out.

q3.question: How do I scan a delivery note?
q3.answer: From the FoodTracks mobile app, use your camera to scan your delivery note or invoice. The OCR automatically recognizes products and quantities and updates your stock.

q4.question: Does FoodTracks handle expiry dates?
q4.answer: Yes, you can log expiry dates for each batch. FoodTracks alerts you before expiration and follows the FIFO method (first in, first out) to minimize waste.

q1.question: How does AI predict my sales?
q1.answer: Our machine learning algorithm analyzes your sales history, weather forecasts, day of the week, local events and your location to generate daily predictions. The more you sell with FoodTracks, the more accurate predictions become.

q2.question: How accurate are the predictions?
q2.answer: On average, our predictions achieve 85% accuracy on daily sales. Accuracy increases over time as the AI learns your specific patterns.

q3.question: Do I need a minimum history for predictions?
q3.answer: Predictions become available after 2 weeks of use. They improve significantly after 1 month, when the AI has enough data to identify your trends.

q4.question: Do predictions account for weather?
q4.answer: Yes, weather is one of the most important factors. AI integrates the 7-day weather forecast to adjust its estimates. A rainy day can reduce your sales by 40% — FoodTracks knows this and tells you in advance.

step1.title: Photograph the invoice
step1.desc: Take a photo of your supplier invoice or delivery note from the FoodTracks mobile app.

step2.title: Automatic OCR
step2.desc: AI recognizes products, quantities, prices and dates in 2 seconds. Review and confirm.

step3.title: Stock updated

benefits.title: Why scan invoices with FoodTracks?
benefits.subtitle: No more manual entry. Save time and eliminate errors.

b1.title: 2 seconds per invoice
b1.desc: Our OCR processes an invoice in 2 seconds. No need to manually enter each line.

b2.title: Zero manual entry
b2.desc: AI automatically recognizes products, quantities and prices. You just confirm.

b3.title: Synced stock
b3.desc: Every scanned invoice updates your stock in real time. No forgetting, no errors.

b4.title: Up-to-date purchase prices
b4.desc: Supplier prices are recorded with every scan. Your margins are always calculated on real data.

b5.title: Automatic archiving
b5.desc: All your invoices are digitally archived. Find any invoice in a few clicks.

b6.title: Multi-supplier
b6.desc: OCR recognizes invoice formats from all your suppliers. No specific configuration needed.

demo.title: Scan, confirm, updated
demo.subtitle: See how FoodTracks OCR turns paper invoices into actionable data.

q1.question: What types of invoices can I scan?
q1.answer: FoodTracks recognizes all common formats: supplier invoices, delivery notes, wholesale receipts. The OCR automatically adapts to the format, whether it's Metro, Sysco, US Foods or your local suppliers.

q2.question: Is the OCR 100% reliable?
q2.answer: Our OCR achieves 97% accuracy. After each scan, you see a summary of detected products and quantities. You can correct if needed before confirming — it takes 5 seconds.

q3.question: Are invoices stored?
q3.answer: Yes, every scanned invoice is digitally archived in your FoodTracks account. You can find them by date, supplier or product. Ideal for accounting and audits.

q4.question: Does scanning update purchase prices?
q4.answer: Yes, with every scan, your ingredient unit prices are automatically updated. This lets FoodTracks calculate your real margins in real time, product by product.

cta.title: Ready to say goodbye to manual entry?
cta.subtitle: Join the food truckers saving hours every week with FoodTracks invoice scanning.
